title: How to CC monday.com in Gmail

posts.author: minadea (MIna Dea Avramovic)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, i need a bit help.
How can I CC Monday.com in my initial email?
If i want to send an offer or start a conversation with a potential client through Gmail, I would like to have that email listed on a Board on Monday.com without having to input it manually.
Thank you!
